name: Apple Worm
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some entangling puzzles in Apple Worm! In each level of this platform puzzle game, you'll have to slither your way to the exit. In order to cross gaps or make your way past obstacles, you'll need to grow your worm. That's where the apples come into play! With each apple you eat, your worm grows longer. This can make getting to new places easier, but beware! Being large also means you can get stuck and once that happens - it's game over! There's 30 challenging levels to complete. Can you make it through them all? How to play Apple Worm? Use WASD or the buttons to move Apple Worm! Who created Apple Worm? Apple Worm was created by Gibton. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Apple Worm for free? You can play Apple Worm for free on Poki. Can I play Apple Worm on mobile devices and desktop? Apple Worm can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
